title: Pixel 10 Users Report Gmail Issue Caused by Google's AI features
description: Some Google Pixel 10 users are reporting a Gmail bug where the AI-powered "Help me write" feature overrides the keyboard, making it difficult to manually reply to emails.

title: Anthropic Joins Big Tech-Backed Coalition For Carbon Removal, Raising Funding By $915m To $1.8bn As AI Boom Drives Need For Climate Solutions
description: Some of the world’s largest technology companies are dramatically increasing their bets on carbon removal technologies, committing hundreds of millions of dollars to help scale an industry viewed as essential for meeting global climate goals. The move comes along with a warning by a new study that the rapidly expanding data-center sector underpinning artificial intelligence [...] The post Anthropic Joins Big Tech-Backed Coalition For Carbon Removal, Raising Funding By $915m To $1.8bn As AI Boom Drives Need For Climate Solutions appeared first on Tekedia .

title: Vietnam accelerates tourism digitalisation via AI, data ecosystems
description: Under this blueprint, tourism is designated as a high-priority sector to enhance the use of digital technology to improve management capabilities, service quality, and the visitor experience. title: Manus original investors plan to buy back AI firm from Meta for US$2 billion: report
